about.heading: Solar products built for every climate
about.paragraph: Our solar lighting systems are engineered with quality cells, weatherproof housings, and dependable battery backup for consistent performance.

about.heading: Design-driven installation guidance
about.paragraph: We help you choose fixtures, layout, and mounting options so your space is illuminated efficiently and attractively.

about.heading: Commercial and residential sourcing
about.paragraph: From single-unit garden lights to bulk packages, our range supports both home improvement and business requirements.
